---
title: "Hello and Welcome, I'm Geovanni Flores!"
image: Images/Project.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/geovanni-flores-9ab279307/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/GeoFlores03
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:geovanniflores866@gmail.com
---

## About Me

Currently I am a student at **Cal Poly Pomona** perusing my **bachelors degree** in business, majoring in marketing. I have gained experience through **social media management**, and now newly learned **data analysis**.

**Fun fact**: I have a passion in traveling and taking photos!

## Skills

-   Social Media Management (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)

-   R (Programming)

-   Efficient in Microsoft (Word, PowerPoint and Excel)

-   Canva

## Education

**Associate's Degree** \| Rio Hondo College, 2021 - 2024

**Bachelor's Degree** \| Cal Poly Pomona, 2024 - 2026 (Projected)

## Let's Connect

[Email me here](mailto:geovanniflores866@gmail.com) or connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/geovanni-flores-9ab279307/).
